preprocessWithOcrHint: For scanned or image-heavy PDFs; text is recognized before translation.
sameLangError: Source and target languages cannot be the same
loginHintQuotaExceeded: Anonymous translation page limit reached. Please sign in (top right) to continue.
loginRequiredTranslate: Please sign in (top right) to start translation when credits billing is enabled.

creditsLoadFailed: Could not load your credit balance. Please refresh the page or sign in again.
selectBothLanguages: Please select both source and target languages
